scripts.build: pnpm run check-node && turbo run build
scripts.dev: pnpm run check-node && turbo run dev
scripts.lint: pnpm run check-node && turbo run lint
scripts.test: pnpm run check-node && turbo run test
scripts.test:services: pnpm run check-node && turbo run dev --filter=@fizzbuzz/web-server --filter=@fizzbuzz/web-dashboard
